scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n app,server,whisper,wakeword -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "turbo dev --filter=@zync/app" "turbo dev --filter=@zync/server" "cd packages/whisper && pip3 install -q -r requirements.txt && python3 server.py" "cd packages/wakeword && pip3 install -q -r requirements.txt && python3 server.py"
